notes: Required for the healthy human gut microbiome case study

inclusion_rule: Study includes gut, stool, fecal, faecal, intestinal, or gastrointestinal microbiome samples
notes: Terms may vary across publications and repository records

inclusion_rule: Study includes healthy, non-diseased, control, or baseline samples
notes: Healthy controls or baseline samples may be eligible

inclusion_rule: Study includes public microbiome sequencing data
notes: Examples include 16S rRNA amplicon or metagenomic sequencing

inclusion_rule: Study provides a usable BioProject, SRA, ENA, or equivalent public accession
notes: BioProject and run-level accessions are preferred for CDI-DAS handoff

inclusion_rule: Study provides enough metadata to interpret organism, sample context, and health status
notes: Minimum metadata must support screening and reuse

inclusion_rule: Study can be prepared for CDI Data Acquisition System handoff
notes: Public run metadata and downloadable files should be available

inclusion_rule: PRJNA802976 is prioritized as the main healthy human gut microbiome case-study BioProject
SRR17868090, SRR17868091, and SRR17868092 are available as the primary test subset
notes: Used to validate the acquisition workflow before scaling
